turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh hey,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Part of pretty good

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh, no, this is Dana. I'm calling because I had a fall in the shower this morning—my belly’s pretty big ’cause I’m pregnant—and now I’ve got some serious pain in my pelvic area. I need to book a CT scan to figure out what’s going on.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure thing. So can we go ahead and set up that appointment?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling to-

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, I’m calling to schedule a CT scan. What do I need to do?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your full name and date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, sure. It’s Dana Whitfield, and my date of birth is March 22nd, 1979.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Data.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No problem.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to confirm, you're looking to book an urgent visit today because of pelvic pain after a fall while pregnant.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, exactly.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that's right. What times do you have open?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There aren't any urgent appointments available this week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to check for openings with any provider or try for a later date?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let’s try for the soonest opening you’ve got, with any provider.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The soonest openings are tomorrow, Tuesday, June 30th.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Okay, what

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you prefer an early morning or afternoon slot?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can offer 8.15 a.m. with Dr. Lukosky.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: 9 a.m. with dr. Noble

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or 1 p.m. with Dr. Lukosky.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: which works best for you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let’s go with the 9 a.m. with Dr. Noble.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment is set for tomorrow.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Tuesday, June 30th at 9 a.m.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: with Dr. Kelly Noble.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, and a list of your current medications.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you have any imaging discs, bring those too.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I think I’m good for now. Thanks a lot.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set Dana

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: if your pain gets worse or you have any new symptoms.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: please call 9-1-1 or go to the ER right away.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take care.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: All right, thanks. I’ll see you tomorrow.
